totalRecords.description: Total number of open issues included in this widget payload.

generatedAt.description: Payload generation timestamp in ISO-8601 format.

zoneIssueConcentration.description: Section 1: For each zone — total issues, distinct auditees contributing those issues, and the average issues per auditee. Sorted descending by avgIssuesPerAuditee. zones[0] is the zone with the highest issue concentration per auditee.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this section represents.

zones.description: All zones sorted descending by avgIssuesPerAuditee.

topGroupsByIssues.description: Section 2: Top 3 groups by total issue count, each with their corresponding audit type name.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this section represents.

top3.description: Top 3 groups sorted descending by issueCount.

topAuditeesByCriticalIssues.description: Section 3: Top 3 auditees by combined High + Zero Tolerance issue count, with individual breakdowns.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this section represents.

totalCriticalIssues.description: Total High + Zero Tolerance issues across ALL auditees — context for the top-3 ranking.

top3.description: Top 3 auditees sorted descending by combinedCriticalCount.

zoneName.description: Zone name exactly as in the API response.

totalIssues.description: Total open issues in this zone.

distinctAuditees.description: Count of distinct auditees those issues belong to in this zone.

avgIssuesPerAuditee.description: Pre-computed: totalIssues / distinctAuditees, rounded to 1 decimal. Sort key (descending).

auditTypeName.description: Audit type associated with this group.

issueCount.description: Total issues attributed to this group. Sort key (descending).

highCount.description: Number of High risk issues for this auditee.

zeroToleranceCount.description: Number of Zero Tolerance issues for this auditee.
